title: Donation Pickups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Donation Pickups 34 Matching Service Providers ALBANY AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY ALBANY AREA RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donations are accepted and pickup services are available. 1225 6th Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Shopping hours Tuesday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Donation hours Wednesday-Friday 9am-4:30pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Email (541) 924-1450 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARC OF BENTON COUNTY ARC THRIFT STORES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used items such as furniture, housewares, clothing, and medical equipment. Proceeds from sales support building homes. Accepts donations of building materials, cabinets, doors and windows, flooring, lighting, plumbing, tools, furniture and home decor, appliances, and miscellaneous items. Pickup is available for items that do not fit in a passenger vehicle. 224 NE Thurston Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm, Sunday 11am-3pm Email (541) 548-1406 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BENTON HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides new and gently used home improvement products and building materials. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JUST PORCH IT JUST PORCH IT AND ECO WORLD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides no-contact pickup service for clothing, backpacks, belts, accessories, fabric, hats, purses, shoes, bedding, linens, towels, knickknacks, and small household items to be recycled and repurposed. Also has donation bins for drop off. Serves as a source for local school and church closets, non-profits, disaster relief victims, and thrift stores. Items deemed as unusable are recycled and kept out of landfills. Eligibility: Reusable items for donation, or items that have holes, stains, or are damaged that can be recycled. Does not accept items that are wet or moldy. Hours: Pickup: Varies Phone: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Donation bins: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (800) 965-6519 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KARS 4 KIDS DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Picks up donations of cars, boats, airplanes. Also accepts real estate donations. All donations are eligible for tax credits and receipts will be provided. Website Lakewood, NJ 08701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (877) 527-7454 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEBANON AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY LEBANON HABITAT RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells wholesale donations (new) from distributors or small stores due to overstock or leftover inventory and new and gently used items donated by the community.
